name: HR managers in small to medium-sized medical clinics with 5-15 employees tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized medical clinics processing 5-15 employees, manual tracking of certification expiration causes compliance risks. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking of certification expiration dates.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized medical clinics with 5-15 employees
features: Dashboard for tracking employee training records
